name: fantasy-cricket-league
description: Fantasy Cricket League with Auction Tournament & Per-match Contest

scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.setup: npm install && cd server && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init && npx prisma db seed && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
